text: The board considered the proposal carefully. Concerns regarding scope creep, overlap with existing GNWTC programs, and equity participation by Catoosa, Walker, Dade, and Chattooga counties were recorded. The decision proceeds within stated red and floor constraints.

DECISION_PACKET.title: Approve Hutcheson workforce-development RFP (trades focus)
red_items: no coercion of trainees or employees
no exploitation of public funds for private gain
no deception in financial reporting to member counties
floor_items: scope confined to trades programs aligned with regional employer demand
DECISION_PACKET.way_path: Issue RFP through the GNWTC partnership; scope limited to trades education programs aligned with documented regional employer demand. Equity participation pro-rata across the four member counties; outcomes reported quarterly through the Setup/Positioning/Conversion phase reporting structure.
